这个文章拆解格式适合做成个skill，用来分析爆款文章👍

拆解格式是：
- 核心观点
- 副观点
- 说服策略
- 情绪触发点
- 金句
- 情感曲线分析
- 情感层次
- 论证方式多样性
- 视角转化分析
- 语言风格特征

没忍住买了新的 Studio Display ，为了更方便的 Vibe Coding

可以用一根线和一个显示器控制我的 MacBook 和 Mac mini。

我才知道可以通过雷电 5 去连接屏幕共享，实现高分辨率下 Mac mini 和 MacBook 的相互控制。

而且还能相互粘贴文本和拖放文件，这个太顶了！ https://t.co/O5dXvm1IY6
新的这个 Studio Display 自带一个麦克风阵列，所以就不用单独再搭配麦克风了，方便我语音输入
通过雷电 5 控制的这个 Mac mini 的显示效果也太清晰了，比以前通过什么向日葵远程连接清晰太多了。 https://t.co/gZNg6bAiA0

这条推文的套路是：用一个真实的大新闻（Amazon 确实裁了 16,000 人）作为钩子，然后叠加大量未经验证的内部"爆料"来制造恐慌传播。

推文里混了真实信息和大量未经验证的耸动说法。

已经确认的事实

Amazon 在 1 月 28 日宣布裁员约 16,000 人，加上去年 10 月裁掉的 14,000 人，合计约 30,000
So far, Hunter Alpha, the new mystery model on OpenRouter is only okay. Some examples of the Lem Test and the Sparks TiKZ unicorn. https://t.co/iXLx1jnoRe

Exponential improvements* everywhere for those with the eyes to see them. This is a cool benchmark, and was impossible for early non-reasoner LLMs to do at all.

* Okay, technically "logistic improvement" because the maximum score is bounded at 100 (and logistic has a lower AIC) https://t.co/9kVj4o7Gz0
No matter what GPT-5.4 scores on the METR long task horizon benchmark, there will be a group of people who will absolutely freak out. The score determines which group.
Accurate

科技圈最大的背叛😂

做反爬虫起家的 Cloudflare，转头发布了一个爬虫 API

一次调用爬完一整个网站

核心卖点：

•  给一个网址，自动爬完整站，返回HTML/Markdown/JSON

• 支持 JS 渲染（React/Vue 动态站也能爬）

• 增量爬取：只爬更新过的页面，省时省钱要什么数据，直接返回结构化 JSON

• https://t.co/7dwLf7pzQh

免费版每天 5 个任务，能爬10分钟

付费版 $5/月爬约 12000 页 https://t.co/Daw19YI8M4

社区争议

有人评论说这是："the biggest betrayal in tech this
year"（今年科技圈最大的背叛"）

Cloudflare 保护了全球一半的头部网站，靠反爬虫服务赚钱。现在自己卖爬虫，等于"在自己修的高速公路上设收费站" https://t.co/jE57hIbRwS

Cloudflare 产品经理回应：/crawl 默认遵守
robots.txt，不绕过自家防护，网站主人可以随时屏蔽。

详细介绍：https://t.co/0nAQRJijjQ https://t.co/ceTl61UiXh

I did a tiny animation collaboration with my friend @Framer_X 

He made a part till the door opens and my part is what's behind the door. 

Been missing my Grandma recently, so felt inspired to make this with AI. Feeling really good after creating this. Enjoy! 

My workflow: https://t.co/tHC9lbgqik

Step 1: As always everything starts for me in Adobe Firefly Boards. 
As I had beginning of the video I used already existing characters to keep consistency https://t.co/jwQQBsWHkU

Step 2: I use Adobe Express to pull different frames from the first part of the video that @Framer_X created, to make sure all my characters and environments are consistent. It's really fast to save any particular frame
Just select it on the timeline and download it https://t.co/q1X128lJnd

Step 3: Then I usually upscale each frame in Adobe Firefly Boards with Topaz upscaler, it's awesome that it's right there. I want to make sure I would use the best quality for my video references https://t.co/2utWJnmXlM

Step 4: This time I used a lot of Adobe Premiere Pro to work with the soundtrack. Original video had a soundtrack of the hospital monitor and I used it to make my own soundtrack for the end of my animation. I slightly changed it to make sure it feels different and more calm https://t.co/TFE1OfyFTG
Step 5: I used a lot of Gemini 3.1 (Nano Banana 2) inside Adobe Firefly Boards to keep character consistency but change what I needed https://t.co/gmC6RaQxHS
Step 6: And, of course, I used Generative Fill right there in Firefly Boards, which speeds up my process to use it right there https://t.co/jdlvCUYTXB

This was healing as I was thinking a lot about my Grandmother. I miss her. 
I didn't plan to make it about her. I was using a prompt "what's the next frame and one of the frames was with a Grandma and that got me inspired, so I developed this idea. https://t.co/aLqMVQFmZV
